open_master_plans.title: Control System Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Rebuild a minimal, durable control system for planning, validation, and closeout after the total reset.

open_master_plans.title: Vision Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Track the current `/vision` implementation state and drive the remaining semantic, executor, and surface work to maturity.

open_plans.title: Plan System God Plan
open_plans.goal: Coordinate the rebuilt control-system and vision planning streams after a total reset.

open_plans.title: Control System Maintenance Plan
open_plans.goal: Keep the active planning surface small and current.

open_plans.title: Control System Rebuild Plan
open_plans.goal: Rebuild the minimal planning lifecycle and active-plan discovery path.

open_plans.title: Control System Validation Plan
open_plans.goal: Reintroduce the minimal checks that keep the planning system honest.

open_plans.title: Vision Semantic Hardening Plan
open_plans.goal: Tighten the semantic envelope, entity resolution, and multilingual handling.
